hypotheses.text: The OEP metric is not diagnostically meaningful by itself.
The rotation and flip assumptions inside OEP are inconsistent.
Mixed-batch regularizer interactions contribute to instability.
The generator architecture is the primary source of artifacts.

events.observation: OEP remains stable near 1 while visible artifacts continue.
Disabling the RGB skip does not remove the artifacts.
The OEP transform stack does not compose flip and rotation together.
Removing rotations from OEP improves training behavior.
